classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline. You use Spell Points instead of slots to fuel your magic.
starting_equipment: A light crossbow and 20 bolts or any simple weapon
A component pouch or an arcane focus
A dungeoneer's pack or an explorer's pack

sub_draconic_bloodline.name: Draconic Bloodline
sub_draconic_bloodline.description: Your innate magic comes from draconic blood mingled with your ancestry.

feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.name: Sorcerer's Spellcasting
feat_sorcerer_spellcasting.description: Innate magic infuses you. You use Spell Points instead of slots to fuel your magic. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

feat_sorcerous_origin.name: Sorcerous Origin
feat_sorcerous_origin.description: Choose a sorcerous origin that describes the source of your innate power.

feat_font_of_magic.name: Font of Magic
feat_font_of_magic.description: Tap into a wellspring of magic (Sorcery Points) to create spell slots or fuel features. You can use a Bonus Action to convert points between them.

feat_metamagic.name: Metamagic
feat_metamagic.description: Twist your spells to suit your needs. Choose two Metamagic options.

meta_quickened.name: Quickened Spell
meta_quickened.description: When you cast a spell that has a casting time of 1 Action, you can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 Bonus Action for this casting.

meta_twinned.name: Twinned Spell
meta_twinned.description: When you cast a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of self, you can spend sorcery points to target a second creature in range with the same spell.

meta_subtle.name: Subtle Spell
meta_subtle.description: You can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without any verbal or somatic components.

meta_empowered.name: Empowered Spell
meta_empowered.description: When you roll damage for a spell, you can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls.

feat_sorcerous_versatility.name: Sorcerous Versatility
feat_sorcerous_versatility.description: Whenever you reach a level that grants the Ability Score Improvement feature, you can replace one of the Metamagic options you know with another.

feat_sorcerer_asi_4.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_4.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_magical_guidance.name: Magical Guidance
feat_magical_guidance.description: You can spend 1 sorcery point as a Reaction to reroll a failed ability check. You must use the new roll.

feat_sorcerer_asi_8.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_8.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_sorcerer_asi_12.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_12.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_sorcerer_asi_16.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_16.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_sorcerer_asi_19.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_sorcerer_asi_19.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_sorcerous_restoration.name: Sorcerous Restoration
feat_sorcerous_restoration.description: You regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.

feat_draconic_ancestor.name: Dragon Ancestor
feat_draconic_ancestor.description: Choose a dragon ancestor. You can speak, read, and write Primordial. Additionally, whenever you make a Charisma check when interacting with dragons, your proficiency bonus is doubled if it applies to the check.

ancestor_red.name: Red Dragon (Fire)
ancestor_red.description: Your ancestor was a Red Dragon. You are deeply connected to the element of Fire.

ancestor_blue.name: Blue Dragon (Lightning)
ancestor_blue.description: Your ancestor was a Blue Dragon. You are deeply connected to the element of Lightning.

ancestor_green.name: Green Dragon (Poison)
ancestor_green.description: Your ancestor was a Green Dragon. You are deeply connected to the element of Poison.

ancestor_white.name: White Dragon (Cold)
ancestor_white.description: Your ancestor was a White Dragon. You are deeply connected to the element of Cold.

ancestor_black.name: Black Dragon (Acid)
ancestor_black.description: Your ancestor was a Black Dragon. You are deeply connected to the element of Acid.

feat_draconic_resilience.name: Draconic Resilience
feat_draconic_resilience.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level in this class. Additionally, when you aren't wearing armor, your AC equals 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

feat_elemental_affinity.name: Elemental Affinity
feat_elemental_affinity.description: When you cast a spell that deals damage of the type associated with your draconic ancestry, you can add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll of that spell.

feat_dragon_wings.name: Dragon Wings
feat_dragon_wings.description: You gain the ability to sprout a pair of dragon wings from your back as a Bonus Action, gaining a flying speed equal to your current speed.

feat_draconic_presence.name: Draconic Presence
feat_draconic_presence.description: As an Action, you can spend 5 sorcery points to exude an aura of awe or fear to a distance of 60 feet. For 1 minute or until you lose your concentration, each hostile creature that starts its turn in this aura must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed or frightened (your choice) until the aura ends.
